SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: NPI 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 10 

SOURCE: PDE and HCIdea™ Prescriber Database 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This variable was new in 2014; beginning with 2014 Part D Prescriber Characteristics file, the NPI is
